QW-301  TESTS — PERFORMANCE QUALIFICATION. (a) Performance qualification tests shall consist of mechanical tests or radiographic examination as required by this paragraph. (b) For groove welds, the welder shall weld a test coupon from which bend specimens are prepared in accordance with QW-452. (c) Radiographic examination may be used as an alternative, if permitted by QW-190. Acceptance criteria shall meet the requirements of this paragraph. The welder shall follow a WPS qualified per QW-200, subject to the qualification range of QW-310. See QW-350 for performance variables. The test shall be supervised as required by QW-300.
